task_completion.description: Verify that the ANOVA analysis module has been opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP interface shows the ANOVA analysis options panel on the left side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'libido' is set as the dependent variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ANOVA options panel, the variable 'libido' is placed inside the 'Dependent Variable' box.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'dose' is set as the fixed factor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ANOVA options panel, the variable 'dose' is placed inside the 'Fixed Factors' box.

task_completion.description: Verify that descriptive statistics are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Descriptive statistics' checkbox is checked in the ANOVA options panel (typically under Additional Options or Display).

task_completion.description: Verify that the eta-squared effect size is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'η²' checkbox is checked under the Effect Size section in the ANOVA options panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that the final results display the required tables and metrics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The right-side results pane displays an ANOVA table containing 'dose' as a factor and an 'η²' column, along with a separate 'Descriptives' table showing statistics for the different dose levels.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JASP application interface is visible, rather than a terminal running R/Python scripts or a code editor.

integrity.description: Verify the results are generated by the JASP software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results appear in the official JASP results pane with standard JASP table formatting, not pasted as plain text into a document.

integrity.description: Verify the correct dataset is being used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The variable list in the JASP interface shows the specific variables 'dose', 'libido', and 'partnerLibido'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains exactly the columns 'dose', 'libido', and 'partnerLibido'. The 'dose' variable contains the values 1, 2, and 3.
